text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Evening, home in Nova Tutinia. Warm bathroom light announces the day's last great appointment.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Tub ready, soft foam, towels stacked. Everything seems under control.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Bath time: the final frontier. Five minutes, pajamas, sleep.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Sparkle Ale toddles in, but he isn't holding the usual rubber duck. He's holding the pirate book.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Mom! Submalin!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: He points with a trembling finger at a drawing: a yellow submarine shooting bubbles at the bottom of the sea.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Those eyes. That smile. Something is about to happen, and it won't be small.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Sparkle Ale climbs into the tub with the focus of a naval engineer. No random play tonight: he has a plan.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: He grabs the yellow bucket, stuffs three rubber ducks inside, balances the plastic cup on top, and plants the shampoo bottle on the very tip as a periscope.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Sweetie... what are you building?

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Submalin. Mine.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: The submarine floats. It actually floats. A duck wearing a tiny paper hat sits on top, an honorary captain.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: VAROOOM! Captain Sparkle in command!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: For a moment, Favilla is almost moved. It's beautiful. It's ingenious. It's completely out of control.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: I'm proud. I'm terrified. Both at once.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Then Captain Sparkle squeezes the periscope-bottle with two determined little hands. The cockpit becomes a water cannon.

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Periscope fire!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Jets of water and foam burst in every direction: the mirror, the ceiling, the tiles, Favilla. The rubber ducks blast off like ejected pilots.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Bubbà. Captain Sparkle. I knew it.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: In thirty seconds flat, the bathroom is a small ocean. Soaked towels, slippery floor, foam climbing up to the ceiling lamp.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Mallow Bellow opens the door at the worst possible moment, laptop in hand and a pull request to finish.

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: Not the laptop, NOT THE LAPTOP!

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Daddy swims! Daddy swims!

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Favilla closes her eyes. A spark pulses under her heart. It's time.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Her hair lights up like a golden mane, her sweater dissolves in pink and gold flames. A small glowing anchor appears on her shoulder.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Hydro-Hero Mode: ACTIVATED.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: With a smooth gesture, Favilla Blaze recalls every drop of water and every bubble into a floating ribbon that rises from the floor like a tide flowing backwards.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Captain Sparkle's submarine lifts gently from the water, escorted like a flagship in parade.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla_blaze
text_blocks.text: Permission to come aboard, Captain?

text_blocks.speaker: sparkle_ale
text_blocks.text: Mishon! Mishon!

text_blocks.speaker: mallow_bellow
text_blocks.text: You're... amazing. Really. Even with a wet laptop.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: Night. Sparkle Ale sleeps wrapped in a pink blanket, the captain duck tucked tight under his arm.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: On the shelf, the handmade submarine rests dry, like a war trophy. Mallow snores on the floor, drying his laptop with a towel.

text_blocks.speaker: favilla
text_blocks.text: Tomorrow we sail again. But tonight... peace.

text_blocks.speaker: narration
text_blocks.text: A soap bubble rises from the sink and pops into a tiny golden spark. Favilla Blaze smiles, and falls asleep.
